title: Macradenia multiflora
taxonomy: Macradenia multiflora is a species of orchid, specifically belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a genus of orchids that are native to Central and South America. The classification of Macradenia multiflora is further categorized under the subfamily Vanilloideae. This orchid species is known for its unique characteristics and growth habits. Macradenia multiflora is typically classified as a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows in the ground.
